title: Penne Penne Lyrics Savaale Samaali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Penne Penne Lyrics Savaale Samaali
Singer(s): S. P. B. Charan

Penne penne minnal penne
kannae kannae kadhal kannae
unnai kandaal ullam yeno
thullum thullum
penne penne

Boomi melae saami pola
vandhu nindraai
nee yaaro
un mugavari tharuvaayaa.

Theekul ennai
nirkka vaiththu
petrol ooththi ne ponal
naan engae thappi selveno.

idiyaaga ennai thaakki
engoyo ponaai penne.
mazhayaaga ennai nenaithu
ponaaye ponaaye penne nee

Azhagaale yudham seidhu
alaimodha vaithaai penne
analaaga ennai modhi
kondraai penne

Penne penne minnal penne
kannae kannae kadhal kannae
unnai kandaal ullam yeno
thullum thullum
penne penne

Boomi melae saami pola
vandhu nindraai
nee yaaro
un mugavari tharuvaayaa.

Boogambam kooda
purattaadhu ennai.
poopandhu ondru oodhi thalludhey.

Undhan velvettu kannaale
vetti saaikindraai.
Ennai naai kutti polathaan
meikindraaye.

Naan paartha pengal
oru kodi thaandum,
aanaalum unai pol
yaarum illaye.

Enai paartha pengal
pala kodi thaandum
aanaalum unai pol paarkavillaye.

Un azhagaale enai kolla
kadavul ninaithaano.
illai enakkaaga
unai vaazha sonnaanodi..

Penne penne minnal penne
kannae kannae kadhal kannae
unnai kandaal ullam yeno
thullum thullum
penne penne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Penne Penne'?

The song 'Penne Penne' expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Savaale Samaali'?

In Savaale Samaali, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Penne Penne'?

The song is sung by SPB Charan and composed by Thaman S.

When was 'Penne Penne' released?

'Penne Penne' was released on March 28, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Penne Penne' from the movie Savaale Samaali beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. It features SPB Charan's enchanting vocals, supported by Thaman S's melodious composition, creating a soothing atmosphere. The lyrics convey a sense of admiration and affection, making it perfect for romantic occasions. This track resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the joys and challenges of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penne Penne from the Savaale Samaali movie is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love beautifully. With SPB Charan's soulful voice and Thaman S's enchanting music, this song creates an unforgettable atmosphere. Dive into the emotions of love and longing with this captivating track that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Oh girl, like lightning, oh eyes, oh love, when I see you, my heart jumps and dances, oh girl, oh girl.
You stand here like a god on earth, who are you? Will you show me your face?
You have kept me in place and poured petrol on me, if you leave, where will I go wrong?
You have pushed me away, oh girl, you have gone away like rain, oh girl, you have left me.
You have fought beautifully and made me restless, oh girl, but you have captured my heart.
Oh girl, like lightning, oh eyes, oh love, when I see you, my heart jumps and dances, oh girl, oh girl.
You stand here like a god on earth, who are you? Will you show me your face?
Even the universe cannot hold me back. It just pushes me away.
Your heart does not even desire me. Your gaze turns me into a fool.
With your beautiful eyes, you are tearing me apart. You are making me feel like a dog.
When I see girls, I feel like I have a million, but no one is like you.
When I see girls, I feel like I have many, but no one can compare to you.
Does God think of taking me because of your beauty? No, I just said to live for you.
Oh girl, like lightning, oh eyes, oh love, when I see you, my heart jumps and dances, oh girl, oh girl.
